_comment: Canonical example for the REQUIREMENTS_INDEX block emitted by the workspace product-owner inside outputs/phase-1-requirements.md. Field reference and consumer list live in docs/file-formats.md. The _comment field is illustrative only — strip it from real output.

requirements.summary: Publisher can upload a PDF file up to 50MB
Upload is only allowed when the book status is APPROVED

edge_cases.summary: Reject files larger than 50MB with HTTP 400
Reject upload if book is not found (HTTP 404)
